svg.title: fastapi-proxykit architecture diagram
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing how requests flow through fastapi-proxykit: from clients through the FastAPI app, into the proxy router with circuit breakers and OpenTelemetry, then fanning out to backend services.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do circuit breakers work in fastapi-proxykit?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenTelemetry work in fastapi-proxykit?')
sendPrompt('How does fastapi-proxykit use httpx under the hood?')
sendPrompt('How does fastapi-proxykit merge OpenAPI specs?')
sendPrompt('How do I configure a backend service route in fastapi-proxykit?')
sendPrompt('Can I have multiple routes in fastapi-proxykit?')
sendPrompt('Does fastapi-proxykit support more than two backend services?')
